output.summary: Inception week — no decisions, marks, or pick outcomes exist yet. No basis for performance reflection.
lessons_for_pm: Cold start: build the initial book with humility — keep position sizes moderate (no single name >8–10%) until we have realized data to calibrate conviction.
Demand cross-signal alignment for any high-conviction entry this week (≥3 of: sentiment, earnings, technical, macro, influencer). With zero track record, alignment is our only edge.
Log explicit theses with falsifiable price/event triggers so next week's reflection has something concrete to grade.
Keep meaningful cash (15–25%) on the first allocation — optionality matters more than full deployment when we have no feedback loop yet.
Avoid chasing recent buzz names without an earnings or macro anchor; influencer credibility priors are untested.
watch_for: Over-concentration in a single theme on day one — diversify across at least 3 uncorrelated drivers.
Anchoring conviction to narrative quality rather than signal stack depth.
Tax-lot hygiene from trade #1 — short-term gains will compound into drag if ignored.
